Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Travel Dates

Dear Customer Service Team,

I am writing to ask about the availability of seats on the weekend. Could you please provide a link to the weekly timetable available online? I also noticed a discrepancy between the morning departure listed in your brochure timetable and the website.

Sincerely,

Bob Johnson<|im_end|>
